    Apply for a personal loan at HSBC with interest rates starting from 9.75%1Footnote link 1Footnote link 1

    Apply now Apply now for HSBC Personal loan
    Top of main content

    Personal loans

    Easy. Online. Apply for an instant loan at attractive interest rates.2Footnote link 2
    1. HSBC IN 
    2. Loans 
    3. Personal loan
    Share

    The loan that's designed for you

    Make your big plans happen an HSBC Personal Loan. Whether it's for education, home improvements, a dream wedding, a family vacation or anything else, you could enjoy interest rates starting from just 9.75%. With an easy application process and quick approvals, we could help you get the funds you need when you need them most. You can even transfer existing personal loans from other banks to us to help you save money on your monthly payments. 

    See how to apply See how to apply for HSBC Personal loan

    Enjoy these personal loan benefits

    • Borrow from INR100,000 to INR5,000,000
      No dream is too big. Whatever your needs, buy now and pay later with an online personal loan, subject to your eligibility.
    • Spread the cost over up to 5 years
      Choose a loan tenure to suit you, with flexible finance payments over 6, 12, 18, 24, 30, 36, 42, 48, 54 or 60 months.
    • Get a quick credit decision
      We could help you get your personal loan as soon as possible – you could even enjoy instant access if you have an HSBC salary account.
    • Apply now with no collateral or guarantor
      You don't need to secure your loan against any of your other assets or have a guarantor for your personal loan.

    Our personal loan interest rates, fees, and charges

    Rates and charges for Q2 2026
    Description Details
    Current interest rate ranges 9.75% pa to 12% pa
    Processing fee (non-refundable) Up to 2% of the loan amount
    Full or partial prepayment charges on the amount being pre-paid (after the minimum 6 month lock-in period)

    5% within 12 months

    4% within 24 months

    3% after 24 months

    You'll find more information and details about the lock-in period in your personal loan agreement.

    Interest rates for Q1 2026
    Description Details
    Annual Percentage Rate (APR) for all personal loans 9.54% pa to 15.85% pa
    Interest range for Q1 2026 9.49% pa to 12% pa
    Mean (average) interest rate in Q1 2026 10.04% pa

    Eligibility criteria and documents required

    Personal loan eligibility

    • You must be between 21 to 60 years old if salaried, or between 21 to 65 years old if self-employed
    • You must already be an HSBC customer
    • You must be an Indian citizen, resident in India only
    • Your correspondence address must be in the cities of Ahmedabad, Amritsar, Bangalore, Chandigarh, Chennai, Coimbatore, Hyderabad, Indore, Jaipur, Kochi, Kolkata, Lucknow, Mumbai, New Delhi, Pune, Vadodara for existing customers and Bhubaneshwar, Nagpur, Surat, Visakhapatnam for Employee Workplace Solutions customers of HSBC
    • Your eligibility for a personal loan and the amount you can borrow may also be affected by your: credit score, employment type, income, work or business experience and ability to repay the loan

    Documents required 

    Important documents 

    Here to help you 

    How to apply for a personal loan

    Apply in our app

    Log on to your HSBC India Mobile Banking app, or download it to start your loan application.

    If you're on a desktop, scan the QR code with your mobile device to go to your app store.

    Complete our form

    If you don't have our app, you can easily apply using our online loan form.

    Fill in the form Fill in the form This link will open in a new window

    Apply online 

    Personal loan FAQs

    If you'd like to know more, read our most frequently asked questions about personal loans and the application process.

    How much can I borrow with my personal loan? 

    How can I calculate my personal loan interest? 

    What is the maximum term for a personal loan? 

    Is a personal loan secured or unsecured? 

    Can I update my details when I apply for a personal loan online? 

    When will I get my loan amount? 

    What CIBIL score do I need to take out a personal loan? 

    Does a personal loan offer tax benefits? 

    You might also be interested in

    Home Loan

     

    Buy a place of your own or save with a balance transfer. 

    Loan Against Property

     

    Raise funds against your residential or commercial property. 

    Smart Loan Against Property

     

    Raise funds against your residential or commercial property, save on interest and reduce your term. 

    Important notes

    1. Special rate of 9.75% is applicable for personal loans given to employees of select businesses. T&Cs apply.
    2. Customers should get a credit decision within 20 minutes. However, loan disbursal to their account may take up to 5 hours.

    Disclaimer 

    Disputes, if any, arising out of or in connection with or as a result of the above Offer or otherwise relating here to shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts/tribunals in Mumbai only.

    Personal Loans are available exclusively to existing HSBC customers. New-to-bank applicants are not eligible.

    The usage of the HSBC India app is governed by the applicable terms and conditions. Please visit www.hsbc.co.in for the same.

    Personal Loans are available in Ahmedabad, Amritsar, Bangalore, Chandigarh, Chennai, Coimbatore, Hyderabad, Indore, Jaipur, Kochi, Kolkata, Lucknow, Mumbai, New Delhi, Pune, Vadodara for existing customers and Bhubaneshwar, Nagpur, Surat, Visakhapatnam for Employee Workplace Solutions customers of HSBC. This list of cities is subject to change from time to time.
